name: BC + AI Ecosystem Association
description: Canada's first grassroots AI industry association launched on May 6, 2025 to unite BC's AI/ML ecosystem. Over 225 technologists (including Indigenous leaders, artists, startup founders, researchers) attended the launch.

name: Vancouver AI Community Meetup
